sections.title: Gym Membership
sections.subtitle: A conversation about joining a fitness center

questions.question: Member name: _______
questions.explanation: She gives her name as Lucy Adams.|她说她叫Lucy Adams。

questions.question: Address: Flat 5, 20 _______ Lane
questions.explanation: She lives at Flat 5, 20 Mill Lane.|她住在磨坊巷20号5号公寓。

questions.question: Phone number: _______
Membership type: _______ month
questions.explanation: She chooses a 12-month membership.|她选择12个月的会员资格。

questions.question: Which time slot does she prefer?
questions.explanation: She prefers evening sessions.|她喜欢晚上的课程。

questions.question: Monthly fee: £_______
questions.explanation: The monthly fee is 35 pounds.|月费是35英镑。

questions.question: Joining fee: £_______
questions.explanation: There is a 20 pound joining fee.|有20英镑的入会费。

questions.question: Which class is she most interested in?
questions.explanation: She is most interested in Zumba classes.|她对尊巴课最感兴趣。

questions.question: Emergency contact name: _______
questions.explanation: Her emergency contact is Mark Adams.|她的紧急联系人是Mark Adams。

questions.question: Emergency contact phone: 07700 _______
questions.explanation: Emergency contact number is 07700 901235.|紧急联系电话是07700 901235。
